final:
module dvfs_controller (  
    input [1:0] workload,  
    output reg [1:0] frequency,  
    output reg [1:0] voltage  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (workload)  
            2'b00: begin  
                frequency = 2'b00; // 1 GHz  
                voltage = 2'b00;   // 1 V  
            end  
            2'b01: begin  
                frequency = 2'b01; // 2 GHz  
                voltage = 2'b01;   // 1.2 V  
            end  
            2'b10: begin  
                frequency = 2'b10; // 3 GHz  
                voltage = 2'b10;   // 1.5 V  
            end  
            2'b11: begin  
                frequency = 2'b11; // 4 GHz  
                voltage = 2'b11;   // 1.8 V  
            end  
            default: begin  
                frequency = 2'b00;  
                voltage = 2'b00;  
            end  
        endcase  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (workload == 2'b00) begin
        frequency = 2'b11;
        voltage = 2'b11;
      end else if (workload == 2'b01) begin
        frequency = 2'b10;
        voltage = 2'b10;
      end else if (workload == 2'b10) begin
        frequency = 2'b01;
        voltage = 2'b01;
      end else if (workload == 2'b11) begin
        frequency = 2'b00;
        voltage = 2'b00;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
